_comment: Example TABLE-mode golden for the repo sample (kc_enrich_sample_data.ga_events, a Google Analytics 4 events table). Facts are grounded in samples/enrichment/sample/docs. Use it as a worked example: enrich the sample dataset, then run `python -m eval --output-dir <out> --golden eval/goldens/example_ga_events.json`.

golden_facts: ga_events contains Google Analytics 4 (GA4) event-level data.
Events can be filtered and queried by a specific date range.
Event parameters are nested and must be unnested for session analysis.
The table supports e-commerce product-interest analysis.
It supports high-level event and user-volume metrics.
